message:
Command `# Perfect - --from flag exists. Resume from GlobalPlacement using --last-run
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

nohup librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --last-run \
    --from OpenROAD.GlobalPlacement \
    config.json \
    > /tmp/pnr_resume.log 2>&1 &

PNR_PID=$!
echo "Resumed LibreLane PID: $PNR_PID"
echo $PNR_PID > /tmp/pnr_resume.pid
sleep 12
ps -p $PNR_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
tail -12 /tmp/pnr_resume.log` executed with exit code 0.

content:
Resumed LibreLane PID: 58007
---
                    4x32_tt_180V_25C.lib line 29, library                       
                    CF_SRAM_1024x32_tt_180V_25C already exists.                 
[04:47:14] WARNING  [OpenROAD.GlobalPlacement] [STA-0441]            flow.py:701
                    set_output_delay relative to a clock defined on             
                    the same port/pin not allowed.                              
[04:47:14] ERROR    The following error was encountered while    __main__.py:189
                    running the flow:                                           
                    OpenROAD.GlobalPlacement failed with the                    
                    following errors:                                           
                    [GPL-0326] reset_n_pad_a_esd_0_h toplevel                   
                    port is not placed.                                         
[04:47:14] ERROR    LibreLane will now quit.                     __main__.py:190

extras.command:
# Perfect - --from flag exists. Resume from GlobalPlacement using --last-run
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

nohup librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --last-run \
    --from OpenROAD.GlobalPlacement \
    config.json \
    > /tmp/pnr_resume.log 2>&1 &

PNR_PID=$!
echo "Resumed LibreLane PID: $PNR_PID"
echo $PNR_PID > /tmp/pnr_resume.pid
sleep 12
ps -p $PNR_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
tail -12 /tmp/pnr_resume.log
